text: - C. Contractor  Parties.  'Contractor  Parties'  means  (a)  Owner,  (b)  Contractor,  (c)  Architect/Engineer,  (d)  any lender  whose  loan  is  secured  by  a  lien  against  the  Project,  (e)  their  respective  shareholders,  members, partners,  joint  venturers,  co-  venturers,  affiliates,  subsidiaries,  successors,  and  assigns,  (f)  any  members, directors,  officers,  employees,  or  agents  of  such  persons  or  entities,  and  (g)  others  as  required  by  the Contract Documents.
